title: Unable to access mobile banking
description: I am unable to log into the mobile banking app since yesterday. It keeps showing an authentication error after entering my credentials.

title: Incorrect transaction charge
description: I noticed an unexpected service charge on my savings account. Please clarify why this fee was applied.

title: Credit card payment not reflected
description: I made a credit card payment two days ago. The amount has been debited but is not reflected in my card balance.

title: ATM withdrawal failed
description: Attempted to withdraw cash from an ATM. The machine did not dispense cash but the amount was deducted.

title: Update phone number request
description: I recently changed my phone number. Need assistance updating it in my bank profile.

title: Online transfer limit issue
description: Unable to transfer funds due to transfer limit restrictions. Requesting clarification on daily transfer limits.

title: Suspicious transaction alert
description: Received a notification about a suspicious transaction. I did not authorize this payment and need it investigated.

title: Cheque book not delivered
description: Requested a new cheque book last week. It has not been delivered yet.

title: Password reset not working
description: Tried resetting my online banking password. The reset link sent to my email is not working.

title: Fixed deposit interest query
description: Need clarification regarding interest calculation on my fixed deposit. The credited interest seems lower than expected.

title: Debit card declined
description: My debit card was declined during a purchase. There are sufficient funds in my account.

title: Account statement download error
description: Unable to download last month's account statement. The system shows a server error.

title: Loan EMI date change request
description: Requesting to change the EMI debit date for my personal loan. Kindly guide me through the process.

title: International transaction blocked
description: My international online payment was blocked. Please enable international transactions on my card.

title: Duplicate transaction recorded
description: A payment I made appears twice in my transaction history. Kindly verify and correct if necessary.

title: Unable to add beneficiary
description: Trying to add a new beneficiary for transfer. The system shows an unexpected validation error.

title: Interest rate clarification
description: Need clarification on the current savings account interest rate. It seems different from what was advertised.

title: Mobile app crashing
description: The banking app crashes immediately after login. This issue started after the recent update.

title: Card limit increase request
description: Requesting an increase in my credit card limit. Please let me know the eligibility requirements.

title: Refund not processed
description: Merchant processed a refund last week. The amount has not been credited to my account yet.
